mission.description: Transparent communication and information platform for post-disaster handling and recovery in Aceh Province.
mission.vision_desc: Guaranteeing the presence of the state in every inch of development through a fast, precise, and transparent infrastructure supervision system.
mission_points: Identify constraints comprehensively for accurate problem mapping.
Providing innovative solution strategies that are most targeted.
Accelerating recovery with high precision and efficiency.

footer.faq_desc: Providing complete information regarding the transparency of our infrastructure reporting system.

faq_list.q: How do I submit a report?
faq_list.a: You can submit a report through the 'Submit Report' form above. Fill in all required data including name, WhatsApp number, address, problem category, and complaint description. Don't forget to share your location so the team can find the location accurately.
Yes, every incoming report will be monitored and followed up on by the relevant team. You can view the status of your report on the 'View Reports' page and track the progress of its handling.

faq_list.q: How long is the response time?
faq_list.a: Response time varies depending on the level of urgency and type of problem. However, our team is committed to responding to every report within a maximum of 3x24 hours.

footer.description: A platform for transparency and community collaboration in Aceh for better, equitable, and sustainable infrastructure development.
footer.copyright: © 2026 UKP2SA - Sumatra Aceh Recovery Acceleration Task Force. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By downloading, accessing, or using UKP2SA (Sumatera Aceh Recovery Acceleration Task Force), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you are not permitted to use our services.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility & Accounts
points: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating reports.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
Use of the application for illegal or unauthorized purposes is strictly prohibited.

user_content.title: 3. User Content & Reports
user_content.intro: You are solely responsible for the content of the reports you submit. You warrant that:
points: Submitted reports are true, accurate, and not fabricated (hoaxes).
Attached photos or location data are your original property or you have the rights to share them.
Reports do not contain material that harasses, defames, or violates the rights of others.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: UKP2SA functions as a reporting platform. We are not directly responsible for the speed of infrastructure repairs by the relevant parties, but we guarantee your data reaches the authorized government management system.

changes.title: 5. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon being posted on the application. Your continued use after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

terms.agreement: By using this application, you consciously agree to all the terms above.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: UKP2SA (Sumatera Aceh Recovery Acceleration Task Force) ("we", "application") is committed to protecting the privacy of our users. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when using our infrastructure reporting service application.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.identity_content: Name, phone number, and email address you provide when creating a report or registering an account.
collection.location_content: GPS coordinates (Latitude & Longitude) when you include an incident location in infrastructure reports.

usage.title: 3. Use of Information
usage.intro: Collected information is used solely for:
points: Verifying the location of damage or infrastructure incidents.
Contacting reporters for further clarification if needed.
Analyzing statistical data for regional development planning.
Providing status updates on reports that have been submitted.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement technical and organizational security standards to protect your data from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or improper destruction. Sensitive data such as location is only accessed by authorized operational personnel.

rights.title: 5. User Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data stored in our system at any time through the account settings menu or by contacting our support service.

privacy.contact_us: Have questions regarding your privacy? Contact us at support@resilient-pixie.gov.id
